posts.author: naama (Naama Erez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi,
We are using the list view widget on dashboards with multiple boards.
We need to have the option to esport the list view to excell the same way we can on table widgets.

What are you trying to achieve

The ability to export customuzed reports from dashboards to excel.

posts.author: leah598santos (Leah Santos)
posts.cookedHtml:
naama:

Hi,
We are using the list view widget on dashboards with multiple boards.
We need to have the option to esport the list view to excell the same way we can on table widgets.

Hi,
It would be very helpful to have the option to export list view widgets to Excel, just like table widgets. This feature is essential for consistent reporting across dashboards with multiple boards. e-zpassfl com
